name: Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ground beef, salt, pepper, and egg.
2. Add cooked rice and chopped onion to the mixture.
3. Steam or boil the cabbage in salted water until leaves are soft.
4. Carefully remove leaves from cabbage and cut thick ribs so they lie flat.
5. Stack 2-3 cabbage leaves and place about ¼ cup of meat mixture on the center of leaves.
6. Roll up the leaves, tucking the ends into the center.
7. Securely fasten the rolls with wooden picks or skewers, or tie them with string.
8. Melt butter in a heavy skillet and brown the cabbage rolls on all sides.
9. Add chicken stock as needed and caraway seeds.
10. Simmer for 45 minutes, adding tomatoes if desired.
11. If thickening is desired, add a paste of flour and cold water. Season to taste.
